title: Variables & Data Types
description: Learn to store and label information in Python — the building blocks of every program.

title: Control Flow
description: Make decisions and repeat actions with if/else and loops.

title: Functions
description: Package your code into reusable, named blocks that do one job well.

title: Lists, Dicts & Sets
description: Organize and work with collections of data efficiently.

title: Object-Oriented Programming
description: Model the real world with classes, objects, and methods.

title: Files & Error Handling
description: Read and write files, and handle things going wrong gracefully.

title: APIs & The Web
description: Connect your Python programs to the internet using APIs.

title: Real Projects
description: Put everything together and build things you can show to people.
